macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Goat Simulator 3 Launches on Nintendo Switch 2 Today
items.summary: Goat Simulator 3 releases on April 1 for Nintendo Switch 2, allowing players to cause chaos in an open world alone or with friends, featuring outfits, minigames, and secrets.

items.title: Starfield Arrives on PlayStation 5 on April 7
items.summary: Bethesda's Starfield, previously an Xbox and PC exclusive, launches on PS5 on April 7 alongside updates, marking a significant cross-platform expansion.

items.title: April 2026 Video Game Release Calendar Revealed with 30+ Titles
items.summary: Numerous games are set for April 2026, including Darwin's Paradox and Morkull Ascend to the Gods on April 2, Hades II on April 14, and major titles like PRAGMATA and REPLACED.

items.title: Pokémon Champions Releases on Switch April 8
items.summary: Pokémon Champions launches on Nintendo Switch on April 8, with a mobile version planned later, highlighted in upcoming Nintendo and Kinda Funny previews.

items.title: Nexon Announces Strategy Shift: Fewer Bets, More Conviction
items.summary: Nexon, publisher of MapleStory and Arc Raiders, revealed to investors it will take fewer risks but invest more heavily in select projects amid 2026 industry trends.

items.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition Hits Switch 2 on April 16
items.summary: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition releases physically for Nintendo Switch 2 on April 16, featuring updated story, enhancements, improved resolution, and frame rates.

items.title: Pokémon Pokopia Partners with IKEA for April 1 Crossover in Japan
items.summary: Pokémon Pokopia teams up with IKEA starting April 1 in Japan, featuring themed store areas and stamp rallies.

items.title: Top Anticipated April Releases Include REPLACED, PRAGMATA, and Saros
items.summary: Men's Journal highlights REPLACED, PRAGMATA, and Saros among top April 2026 console releases, many delayed from March.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Iran's IRGC Threatens Attacks on 18 US Tech Giants Starting April 1
items.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) has warned it will target 18 major US companies including Apple, Microsoft, Google, Meta, Tesla, Intel, IBM, and Boeing from 8 PM Tehran time on April 1, in retaliation for alleged involvement in assassinations of Iranian leaders. The statement urges employees to evacuate workplaces and residents near facilities to leave a one-kilometer radius.

items.title: Iran Lists Apple, Google, Meta Among 18 US Firms for Retaliatory Strikes
items.summary: IRGC accuses US tech and industrial firms of complicity in targeted killings and plans to destroy their regional operations starting April 1, naming companies like Meta, Google, Apple, Tesla, and Boeing. The White House states the US is prepared to counter any attacks.

items.title: Iran Warns of Destruction to US Tech Firms' Units Over Leader Assassinations
items.summary: IRGC threatens strikes on 18 companies including Apple, Google, Meta, IBM, Tesla, Nvidia, and Boeing from April 1, labeling them terrorist entities involved in high-tech warfare against Iran. Employees are advised to leave workplaces immediately.
